title: platylepis goodyeroides
intro: Platylepis goodyeroides, also known as the Goodyer's orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Platylepis goodyeroides include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is typically prepared into a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used as a poultice to apply directly to the skin.
